steps.title: Identify the sentence's role in the passage
steps.content:
After praising Jones's talent, the underlined sentence introduces a second dimension: it explains why the novella matters beyond quality prose.

Specifically, featuring Blackfeet characters “helped to ensure that Indigenous people have a place within the horror genre.” The sentence's role is to establish the significance of this representation.

steps.title: Match the function to the answer
steps.content:
Choice C — It highlights the significance of the portrayal of Indigenous people in Mapping the Interior. This directly captures what the sentence accomplishes.

The other choices mischaracterize the sentence's function:
  • A invents a challenge to autobiography
  • B creates a prediction about non-Indigenous authors
  • D raises reader purchasing questions—none of which appear in the text


That is the correct answer.
